title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.46 — PHOTOREAL PLATES SHIPPED (Phase B integration). The static console is now four pre-rendered Blender plates embedded in BinaryData (Resources/Plates: hybrid/green x 1x/2x, baked by Tools/photoreal/creosote_console_scene.py --mode plates with exact-fit ortho camera 968x660, real plugin fonts (Montserrat-Bold silkscreen), aging pass in the enamel materials (mottle + roughness variation), tile WELLS only (live tiles draw bezel+cap on top — zero alignment risk), titles/brand/screws/blank plates baked, all dynamic hardware (power/emerald/glass/tabs/auto) excluded from plates). EPh::kPlates flag in CreosoteTheme.h gates the procedural painting: paintContent draws the theme+scale-selected plate via ImageCache (UI_THEME picks hybrid/green; physicalPixelScaleFactor>=1.5 picks 2x), EU::paintModuleShell keeps only the accent rail, ModulePanel/LimiterPanel/MeteringPanel skip card+patina+title (silkscreen doesn't dim — lamps carry power state now), SUMMING titleLabel hidden. Legacy painting intact behind the flag (kPlates=false reverts everything). VERIFY VISUALLY IN ABLETON: console reads as photographed hardware; tiles/buttons/meters live on top; TWEAK>MASTER CHASSIS toggles HYBRID/GREEN plates live; check tile/well alignment at all 3 UI scales and both themes; look for double-drawn or missing chrome. REMAINING PHASE B POLISH: worn-button/tab styling vs plate, header button wells?, VU meter surrounds, deeper aging (chips/scuffs), possible baked bezels for tiles later. OPEN: LIMITER rename.
